/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libpubsub2_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libpubsub2_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/pubsub2_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/pubsub2_interfaces/msg/filtro_sensor__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/mariola/visual_ws/build/pubsub2_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libpubsub2_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
